Name: Atlas Knowledge Hub
content: Atlas is an English-first project hub that turns structured Notion pages into a polished static site.

content.text: The top-level project owns the visual identity, timeline, tags and public links.

Name: Notion Sync
content: Reads Notion data sources, page covers, icons and first-level page content blocks.

Name: Static Renderer
content: Builds the two-column project page and compact inline subproject list.

Name: Beacon Deploy Console
content: Beacon tracks lightweight deployment surfaces and turns operational notes into a readable status page.

content.text: The main project is the item readers scan; subprojects are supporting implementation parts.

Name: Release Feed
content: Publishes a static feed of recent deployment events.

Name: Health Checks
content: Collects small endpoint checks and exposes them in the main project view.
